items.title: New Research: Why All-Inclusive Travel Is Having a Moment
items.summary: All-inclusive vacations are becoming more popular with travelers, who are seeking highly personalized experiences and a wide range of activities that maximize their travel investments. New data proves that this is more than a trend.

items.title: Indian Hotels’ Cooking Gas Shut Off By Iran War
items.summary: A combination of the Iran war and India’s reliance on imported fuel is shutting down hotel kitchens and train galleys while sending up airline ticket prices.

items.title: Hyatt CFO on Global Shocks: Wealthy Travelers Aren’t Canceling Trips
items.summary: Hyatt's luxury-heavy customer base is rerouting trips rather than avoiding travel after recent violence in Mexico and a war in Iran.

items.title: The Middle East’s Aviation Risk: 3 Airlines, 1 Fragile Global Network
items.summary: Global travel flows depend heavily on just three airlines. When geopolitics disrupts one hub, the shock can quickly ripple worldwide.

items.title: U.S. Citizen Stuck in Qatar Hopes for a Repatriation Flight While Scheduled Service is Cancelled
items.summary: With limited exceptions, the U.S. State Department is running the show right now in determining which Americans get onto flights out of Qatar.

items.title: How Montreal Quietly Became the World’s Second Most Important Travel Tech Hub
items.summary: The travel industry’s most important ecosystem story may be Montreal, where aviation DNA, patient capital, and a single Expedia office accidentally created a $15 billion infrastructure layer that much of the industry now runs on.

items.title: Disney Taps New Leader for Powerful Parks and Experiences Division
items.summary: It’s a big job: Disney’s parks business has become the company’s financial engine.

items.title: Iran War Cited as Air India Raises Fuel Surcharge
items.summary: Air India has a long history of financial troubles, and it is now taking an up front approach to discussing problems and its plans to tackle them.

items.title: Hilton CEO Calls Out Slide in U.S. Tourism but Sees Economic Boost Ahead
items.summary: Hilton CEO Chris Nassetta said that over 30 years, the U.S. has allowed its share of global inbound tourism to collapse. Regaining ground in the global race for visitors could boost jobs.

items.title: Pieter Elbers Turned IndiGo Into a Global Contender. An Operational Meltdown Undid His Leadership
items.summary: The rushed departure of Pieter Elbers, who was tasked with bringing IndiGo to the global stage, unfolded quickly after a major operational setback in December 2025.

items.title: 比斯特：“绽放她未来女性创业大奖”报名启动
items.summary: 比斯特系列（The Bicester Collection）正式启动2026年度“绽放她未来女性创业大奖”（Unlock Her Future Prize）报名通道，面向东亚及东南亚的女性社会企业家发出诚挚邀请。

items.title: 广东汕头澄海:万盏灯火游古村 三百年民俗照归人
items.summary: 3月7日晚，广东汕头澄海的南砂乡灯火如龙，传承三百余年的“营灯”习俗如期上演。

items.title: 云南迪庆多元民宿引游客:从“歇脚处”到“生活场”
items.summary: 在迪庆藏族自治州，从特色藏式民居到精品野奢营地，这些越发多元化的民宿正成为吸引游客的因素之一。

items.title: 广西亮相柏林国际旅游交易会
items.summary: 近日，在2026年柏林国际旅游交易会（ITB Berlin）上，广西壮族自治区文化和旅游厅组织5家深耕国际市场的旅游企业亮相会场。

items.title: 广州邮轮火热 逾2400名游客开启东南亚三国之旅
items.summary: 春节过后，广州邮轮旅游市场持续火热。爱达邮轮“地中海号”3月11日从广州南沙邮轮母港启程，搭载2400多名游客，开启为期9天8晚的东南亚三国之旅。

items.title: 从“能用”到“好用”:广州南沙探索智慧养老新路径
items.summary: 广州南沙近日发布《南沙区智慧养老综合服务场景清单》此次发布的10项智慧养老应用场景，覆盖老年人全生命周期需求。

items.title: 如何提高火车票购票成功率？
items.summary: 买票时如果心仪区间无票，可以通过12306选择中转换乘，系统会智能推荐同站、同城、同车换座等多种方案。也可以第一时间使用铁路12306官方候补购票功能，这是最可靠的补充购票渠道。

items.title: 广深港高铁跨境客流过亿背后:日常往来见证湾区融合
items.summary: 广深港高铁开通七年多来，累计跨境客流已突破1亿人次，为粤港澳大湾区的融合发展，书写着山海相依、携手同行的故事。

items.title: 繁花迎客解锁农文旅新体验 绘春日消费新图景
items.summary: 春暖花开，各地花海次第绽放。今年赏花游不断推陈出新，沉浸式体验、田园休闲、文旅融合等新场景备受青睐。

items.title: 中东战事扰乱航空业 燃油飙升致多家航司调价
items.summary: 受中东战事延宕影响，航空燃油价格上涨，多家航空公司宣布上调机票价格或燃油附加费，并调整航班。此外，航线变更和空域收紧也加剧了全球航空业运营压力。

items.title: 龙虾太火，互联网老炮组团进场了
items.summary: “能和AI聊天就不要和人类聊天，删除所有90年之前出生人的联系方式，千万不要沾染任何老登气息”。孙宇晨这段暴论刚出来的时候，我还有点生气：但我发现，已经有人对号入座了。傅盛、朱啸虎、李开复，最年轻的48岁，最老的64岁，都在这波明显由年轻人主导的龙虾热中，密集发声。要么是开直播展示自己如何与时俱进，要么是拼命渲染AI焦虑，比如说：今后就不需要给人看的网站了。所有的网站，是给机器、给AI看的。

36氪获悉，中复神鹰发布异动公告，公司股票交易连续3个交易日内日收盘价格涨幅偏离值累计超过30%，属于股票交易异常波动情形。近日，多家媒体报道公司推出SYT80碳纤维新品，实现SYT80碳纤维的百吨级制备。本次发布的新产品虽已开始市场推广和应用评价，但该产品作为原材料要实现大规模销售，市场推广和应用评价等环节的周期可能较长，存在客户认证进度及未来销售价格波动等不确定性。

items.title: 「中科天算」完成亿元天使+轮融资，万卡级太空超算中心计划于2030年建成｜36氪首发
items.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，天基智能计算与应用系统提供商 「 中科天算 」 宣布完成亿元天使 +轮融资。本轮融资由上海未来产业基金、中芯聚源、深创投、水木清华校友种子基金、格物致知私募基金、无限基金SEE Fund、洪泰基金、英诺基金、川翔投资、梅花创投联合投资。

据悉，本轮所募集的资金将主要用于推进中科天算战略项目“天算计划”的实施，加快太空超算节点的在轨验证，强化太空智能计算与超算技术的研发及系统优化，推动太空算力基础设施的持续升级。

items.title: 扎根水声产业23年，中科院声学所博士创业，想用「性价比」声纳打造信息化蓝海｜36氪首发
items.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，海洋信息系统解决方案企业浙江声为科技有限公司（下简称“声为科技”）宣布完成近千万元天使+轮融资，由启迪之星创投独家投资，翊荣资本担任长期独家财务顾问，所筹资金将主要用于产品可靠性优化与产线建设。

声为科技注册成立于2023年11月，隔年3月正式启动运营，是一家专注于水声技术研发与海洋信息化解决方案的高科技企业，总部落在浙江绍兴，目前设有北京办事处和三亚全资子公司。

声为科技创始人田甜拥有超20年水声信号处理技术研究和水声装备研制经验，博士毕业于中科院声学所，是李启虎院士科研

items.title: 打造稳定、可信、低成本的卫星通信终端，「宇迹航天」完成千万元天使轮融资｜36氪首发
items.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，卫星通信终端研制企业宇迹航天科技（北京）有限公司（下简称“宇迹航天”）宣布完成逾千万元天使轮融资，投资方包括启迪之星创投、水木清华校友种子基金、无限基金SEE Fund等，所筹资金将主要用于核心产品的研发投入及批量化生产能力建设。

宇迹航天以卫星通信应用终端为市场切入点，专注于航天新一代信息化与智能化产品的研发与制造，公司致力于解决复杂环境下的信号接入与通信抗干扰难题，为卫星互联网的落地应用提供核心硬件及算法支撑。

创始人王浡力是一名连续创业者，拥有近十年

items.title: 追觅一口气要造五颗芯片，直接对标高通、星链、英伟达
items.summary:
作者丨邱晓芬

编辑丨苏建勋

追觅也要造芯了。

3月11日，在AWE2026芯片产业高峰论坛上，追觅科技孵化的芯��公司「芯际穿越」宣布了五大芯片方向——手机、自动驾驶、太空算力盒子、电脑、泛机器人。

「芯际穿越」负责人傅海洋向《智能涌现》表示，这五大芯片成果未来不仅用于追觅自己的业务，也会对外开放。

据发布会介绍，「芯际穿越」正在研发手机核心处理器“赤霄01”，主打图形性能提升，支持1.5K分辨率下120帧全场景光线追踪。

items.title: 硬氪独家 | 中科院博士创业光学芯片，主攻3D机器视觉和AI微显，已实现稳定量产
items.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，中科融合感知智能研究院（苏州工业园区）有限公司（下称“中科融合”）近日宣布完成新一轮近亿元融资，本轮由松禾资本与长兴基金等机构联合投资。创立 8 年来，公司已完成多轮融资，背后股东包括松禾资本、华映资本、清华水木创投、硅港资本、凌云光、万讯自控等多家产业资本与投资机构。

中科融合源自中国科学院纳米技术与纳米仿生研究所。公司以扫描式MEMS微振镜芯片为核心技术底座，推出MEMS结构光3D和微投影显示光机整体解决方案，切入3D机器视觉

items.title: 科氪｜全系旗舰亮相AWE2026，石头科技展示从技术到市场的系统性实力
items.summary:
2026年3月12日，中国家电及消费电子博览会（AWE2026）在上海开幕。全球智能清洁行业领导品牌石头科技，集中呈现了其在家庭清洁领域的前沿技术布局与成果，系统展示了覆盖扫地机器人、洗地机、洗衣机三大品类的全系旗舰产品，并携手人民日报健康客户端联合发布了《2026家庭地面清洁标准白皮书》。

这一系列组合举措，展现了头部企业从提供产品到定义体验、参与构建行业标准的系统性能力，是其从市场领先者向产业生态共建者演进的关键跨越。

items.title: 科氪｜追觅割草机器人亮相2026 AWE 以领先技术引领庭院智能化升级
items.summary: 近日，2026中国家电及消费电子博览会（AWE）在上海拉开帷幕。作为本届规模最大的参展商之一，追觅科技携多款创新产品与首创技术重磅亮相。割草机器人作为追觅宇宙场景生态中户外场景的重要代表，集中展示了其在激光雷达感知、人工智能算法等核心技术的最新突破，充分彰显追觅在智能割草机器人赛道的技术实力与行业引领地位。

items.title: 清华学霸团队打造“AI工程师”，帮2000万工程师打造AI助手｜水下项目
items.summary:
2026年，全球AI产业迎来关键转折点，大模型狂热逐渐退潮，核心叙事从技术军备竞赛转向商业化兑现。

在这样的周期里，AI+CAD平台公司「品览科技」选择了一条相对另类的发展路径：没有追逐大模型风口，没有做C端爆款，也不想讲AI替代人力的故事，而是选择钻进图纸堆，切入工业设计这个不太“性感”的细分领域。

品览科技创立于2018年，专注于AI+CAD核⼼平台的研发与产业化应用，为AEC⼯程设计和MFG⼯业设计⾏业提供AI设计整体解决⽅案。创始人李一帆毕业于清华⼤学电⼦⼯程系，后在卡耐基梅隆大学攻读硕士学位。在硅谷创业期间，

items.title: 自研全球最小行星滚柱丝杠，量产价格降至百元级，「诺仕机器人」完成超亿元A轮融资｜水下项目
items.summary:
36氪获悉，具身智能核心部件供应商「诺仕机器人」（下简称“诺仕”）近日宣布完成超亿元A轮融资。本轮融资由上海半导体装备材料产业基金/浦东科创领投，联想创投、琥珀资本跟投，汽车零部件上市公司鹏翎股份、克来机电战略入股，老股东上汽创投继续加注。诚一资本持续担任公司长期财务顾问。资金将主要用于产能提升、产品研发与流动资金补充。

诺仕机器人成立于2023年7月，专注于微型行星滚柱丝杠及基于此的微型线性执行器（电缸）的设计、研发与制造，致力于成为汽车、人形机器人及工业领域高精度传动与运动控制核心供应商。

目前，诺仕自研的直径仅1.5mm、螺母直径5.5mm的全球

items.title: Group14 opens factory to produce battery materials for flash charging EVs
items.summary: The startup's new BAM-3 facility can make enough silicon anode material annually to supply about 100,000 long-range EVs.

items.title: When startups become a family business
items.summary: This season on Build Mode, we’re diving into what it takes to build a world-class founding team. This week we’re exploring different kinds of co-founder dynamics and what it takes to build a startup with your family.

items.title: Chinese brain interface startup Gestala raises $21M just two months after launch
items.summary: This is the largest early-stage funding in China’s brain computer interface industry.

items.title: AI ‘actor’ Tilly Norwood put out the worst song I’ve ever heard
items.summary: This song is an AI actor's rallying cry to other AI actors, urging them to keep going despite the naysayers who doubt their humanity. Literally no one can relate to this.

items.title: Nuro is testing its autonomous vehicle tech on Tokyo’s streets
items.summary: Nuro began testing its self-driving software on public roads in Tokyo, marking the first international expansion for the AV startup.

items.title: Google Play is adding new paid and PC games, game trials, community posts, and more
items.summary: The updates indicate that Google is focused on transforming Google Play into an enhanced gaming hub.

items.title: Ford’s new AI assistant will help fleet owners know if seatbelts are being used
items.summary: Ford Pro AI debuted at Work Truck Week in Indianapolis and is now available to all of its U.S.-based Pro telematics subscribers.

items.title: Essential Gear for an Emergency Kit—for Cars or Go-Bags
items.summary: We consulted preparedness experts and WIRED's team of testers for the essential gear to keep on hand in case of wildfires, earthquakes, and lord knows what else.

items.title: Google Maps Gets Chatty With a New Gemini-Powered Interface
items.summary: “Ask Maps,” rolling out today to Google Maps on mobile, lets you ask Gemini questions about locations and even to plan trips on your behalf.

items.summary: Sennheiser’s new TV transmitter system uses the power of Auracast to connect nearly infinite headphones—if you can find a pair you like.

items.title: Best Massage Guns of 2026: Hyperice, Therabody, and More
items.summary: Massage guns used to be simple percussive devices. Now, they use vibrations, hot and cold therapy, and even LED light to ease post-workout pain and promote muscle recovery.

items.summary: A more exciting MacBook Pro is waiting in the wings, but the M5 Max shows the continued success of Apple Silicon.

items.summary: The 98th Annual Academy Awards will happen on Sunday, March 15. Here's how to make sure you catch every speech, joke, dress, and song.

items.summary: TVs are bigger and better than ever. These are my favorite screens that come in extra-large sizes, from affordable to ostentatious.

items.title: AeroPress Coffee Is Superb When I’m Traveling, but I Use Mine Even When I Stay Home
items.summary: Its convenience can’t be beat in hotels, Airbnbs, and campsites, but AeroPress’ clever portable coffee maker is also excellent for a quick cup at home when a whole pot would be too much.

items.summary: Enjoy big savings on your next adventure with our Booking.com coupons and handpicked travel deals.

items.summary: Today we’re talking about the messy, fast-moving situation at Anthropic, the maker of Claude that now finds itself in a very ugly legal battle with the Pentagon.  The back-and-forth is complicated, but as of a few days ago, the Pentagon had deemed Anthropic a supply chain risk, and Anthropic ha

items.summary: Though many AI boosters have convinced themselves that the technology can spit out films and television series whole cloth, claims of Hollywood being cooked feel very premature when you see what people are making with the most popular image/video models on the market. items.title: Microsoft’s Copilot Health can connect to your medical records and wearables
items.summary: Microsoft announced on Thursday that it's launching Copilot Health, a "separate, secure space" in Copilot for asking questions about lab results and medical records, searching for providers, analyzing data from wearables, and other health-related chats. The feature will have a phased rollout, so it

items.title: You can now ask Google Maps ‘complex, real-world questions’ — and Gemini will answer
items.summary: Google is continuing to weave Gemini into the firmament of its most-used products. Today, it announced that Google Maps was getting a new AI-powered "Ask Maps" feature that allows for "complex, real-world questions" with highly detailed, personalized responses. items.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer turns your spare Mac into an AI agent
items.summary: Perplexity wants to be more than just an answer engine. On Wednesday, it launched Personal Computer, a new AI agent tool that can turn a spare Mac into a locally run AI system, pitching it as "a digital proxy for you." Personal Computer will run 24/7 on a dedicated device on your local network, have

items.title: JBL’s new party speaker comes with a karaoke mic that helps you hit those high notes
items.summary: Karaoke is more fun for everyone when the person holding the mic sounds as good as a song's original performer. items.title: Iran-linked cyber attack targets US medtech giant Stryker
items.summary: US medical equipment provider Stryker said its global networks were disrupted by a cyberattack on Wednesday, allegedly carried out by a hacking group linked to Iran. The attack impacted Stryker's internal Microsoft environment and deleted information from devices, with one employee telling NBC News

items.title: One of Grammarly’s ‘experts’ is suing the company over its identity-stealing AI feature
items.summary: For months, Grammarly has been using the identities of real people (including us) for its "Expert Review" AI suggestions without getting their permission, and now it's facing a lawsuit from one of the journalists included, as previously reported by Wired. The class-action complaint filed by journali

items.title: iPhone Fold rumor: iPad-like multitasking, but no iPad apps and no Face ID
items.summary: Apple's rumored foldable iPhone will come with an iPad-style interface that will allow users to view apps side-by-side, according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. Gurman also reports that the outer display will be around the size of a small iPhone. The inner display will reportedly come wit

items.title: Some of the best horror games ever made are included in Humble’s latest $15 bundle
items.summary: Humble has teamed up with Frictional Games for a new bundle of PC games that pushed the horror genre forward. The bundle includes the Penumbra Collectors Pack, all four Amnesia titles (The Dark Descent, A Machine for Pigs, The Bunker, and Rebirth), and Soma, which I consider to be its opus in terms

items.title: 香港廉政公署和香港证监会逮捕八名内幕交易人员
items.summary: 香港廉政公署和香港证监会表示，两家持牌证券公司和一家持牌对冲基金的高级管理人员因涉嫌受贿和内幕交易被捕。

items.title: 英伟达将向AI云服务商Nebius投资20亿美元
items.summary: 此举延续英伟达对合作伙伴和客户的投资热潮。但这家芯片巨头与自身客户达成的此类融资安排引发“循环融资”担忧。

items.title: 欧盟酝酿设定天然气价格上限
items.summary: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩称，欧盟正在考虑提供价格补贴或设定上限等一系列措施，以求“立即缓解”中东冲突引起的欧洲能源价格上涨。

items.title: 印度放宽对中资投资的限制
items.summary: 莫迪内阁发表声明称，放行与印度在陆地接壤的邻国在资本品、电子产品和太阳能电池领域的投资。印度依赖中国技术来提升制造业。

items.title: 德国今年开局“非常疲弱”给复苏前景带来变数
items.summary: 在中东战火推高能源价格之前，德国的出口和制造业就相当疲弱，令人质疑欧洲最大经济体还能不能在2026年反弹。

items.title: 中国交通部就中东航运中断及涨价约谈欧洲巨头
items.summary: 该部就“国际航运经营行为”分别约谈马士基和地中海航运公司负责人，对加收费用、提高运费和暂停航线等行为表达关切。

items.title: 雷诺寻求降低对欧洲市场销量的依赖
items.summary: 这家法国汽车制造商计划拓展印度和其他新兴市场，到2030年实现欧洲以外市场贡献半数销量。

items.title: 渣打计划将新加坡的中国客户服务团队规模扩大一倍
items.summary: 近期一系列引人注目的洗钱丑闻并未令渣打推迟扩张计划。该银行今年将在新加坡增加至多50名客户关系经理，以吸引富有的中国客户。其认为新加坡在吸引中国财富方面具备历史优势。

items.title: 宁德时代公布超预期盈利后股票大涨
items.summary: 得益于储能系统的强劲需求，包括人工智能数据中心的需求，宁德时代2025年净利润为722亿元人民币，同比增长42%。

items.title: 中国今年前两个月出口激增21.8%
items.summary: 在特朗普与习近平举行关键峰会之前，中国出口激增预示着贸易顺差还将进一步扩大。去年这一顺差达到创纪录的1.2万亿美元。
